title: Remove Advertising from WorkForms Success/Thank You Page
excerpt:

I’ve provided a more detailed breakdown of the issue here, but essentially, a “Create a WorkForm” banner has been quietly ad…

posts.author: Megna (Megna)
posts.cookedHtml:
I can’t believe I’ve been requested to even put this in as a feature request, but here we are.

I’ve provided a more detailed breakdown of the issue here, but essentially, a “Create a WorkForm” banner has been quietly added to forms on the success page, effectively advertising to all our customers, despite us being on the Pro version.

My “feature request” is simple. Remove the blatant WorkForms call-to-action from the Success/Thank You page if “hide branding” is selected.

posts.author: david.battersby (David Battersby)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree. It makes it look like we’re using a random free tool, not one that we’ve specifically procured and vetted because we’re comfortable with it’s security features.

posts.author: Megna (Megna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, exactly! I feel it completely detracts from the brand/image we’re looking to portray to our clients.

Not to mention we’re paying for the application. If I chose to “show branding”, are they going to start crediting our accounts for new sign ups?

posts.author: Megna (Megna)
posts.cookedHtml: Someone mentioned on my other post that the Create WorkForms prompt wasn’t showing on their form & I just checked on one of our live ones & it’s no longer showing up! I’ve leave this until we have confirmation of a change, but I’m hopeful!

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: This isn’t appearing on our forms. The hide branding is ticked. I did note the success image has changed, so perhaps it’s been addressed.

posts.author: Ultraviolet (A. Albaajari)
posts.cookedHtml: 100% Agreed. We even stopped using the Forms last week when we saw the forced advert shoved in without permission. Plus not even giving an option to Pro-users on an organisation-wide account to disable it is an absolute disgrace honestly.
